titleStmt.title: SII 7.789: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 789. (A.R. No. 163-A of 1902). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
The beginning of every line is built in by a modern wall.tsarada jēṣṭa su 7 maṁvalūmimāsa 26 lu śrīmaṁmahāmaṁḍaḷēśvara śrīvīrapratāparājādhirāja rājaparamēśvaraThe letters śvara are written above the line.Aṣṭadiku manōbhayaṁkara pūrva dakṣiṇa paścimōtara ballāḷarāya tuluvadaḷavibhāḍa yādavarāyapratiṣṭhācāryya mastakāśūla śrīvīrapratāpa dēvarāyamahārāyaruThe letters rāyaru are written above the line.
27 lu śrīmamabhūpa vaḷirilaṁpaṭina cāvaḍiyalū si cipaṭheyavāgi baha naṁma Uṁbaḷi patageya sīmēya tiruvaḍiya nāḍamale kaḍacapaṭina tirumāṇiguḷiya mādapanāyakara koyilasānivarige koṭa daṁ
ḍeyadeṁdu stānadavaṁ lāgi naḷasaṁvatsarada Āśāḍa su 1 Arabhyavāgi sarvamānyavāgi sērsi koṭadu tirumāṇiguḷiya stāna 1 ke śūlavari ga 2 r 2 Akṣāradalū stāna voṁdakaṁ rēkhe pramāṇu śūlavariya Eraḍu hoṁnu yi paṇavanū
vanu māḍisikoṁḍu tirupaḷi Aṁgaraṁgabhōga Amṛtapaḍiyanū naḍesi pratāvi dēvarāyamahārāyara hesaralū tirunāḷu voṁdu Avasaravanū naḍasikoṁḍu AcaṁdrārkastāIyāgi sukhadalu Anubhavisūdu Eṁdu koṭa darṁmaśāsanada paṭeya stānamāṁnya
la panimūvaranū rakṣisali paḍavadu yiṁtī biṁnaha yī sarvamānyada dharṁmake Ārūbba yaraḍane naḍavanu gaṁgeyali hasuva koṁda pāpake hōhanu .
Digital edition of SII 7.789 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
